spectators sitting and standing on the pool deck

atomic_facts.fact: A player in a blue cap raises both arms straight up out of the water.
A yellow ball is airborne to the right of the players.
A player in a white cap reaches forward in the foreground.
The text '6FT-9IN' is visible on the pool deck wall.
Spectators are watching the game from the background.

spatial: The player in the blue cap is in the center of the frame, positioned to the right of the goal net. The yellow ball is to the right of the player in the blue cap. The player in the white cap is in the foreground, below the player in the blue cap. The orange cone is in the background, behind the players in the water.
state_changes: Player in blue cap #13 raises both arms vertically; ball flying through air.

atomic_facts.fact: A swimmer in the foreground is moving through the water, creating a splash.
Another swimmer surfaces in the center of the frame.
Spectators are standing on the pool deck in the background.
The text 'GET-R' is visible on the pool wall.

spatial: The swimmer in the foreground is in front of the swimmer surfacing in the center. The red and yellow lane ropes are behind the swimmers in the water. The spectators and the orange cone are on the pool deck, which is above and behind the water.

atomic_facts.fact: A group of men in blue swim caps and briefs are standing under a tent.
The men are raising their arms and cheering.
A man on the right is holding a yellow ball.
The text 'WAVES' is visible on the tent and as an overlay.

spatial: The group of swimmers is positioned under the dark green canopy tent. The man in the light blue shirt is to the right of the central group of swimmers. The orange cone is on the ground in front of the group. The white 'WAVES' logo is superimposed over the center of the image.
state_changes: Group of men standing and cheering; man holding the yellow ball on deck.
